Video.summary: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.
Video.title: The Beach Boy

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a convicted murderer who is free and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.
Video.title: Guilty

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: Someone has been setting fires all over the city to empty warehouse, and Hunter and McCall are on the case.
Video.title: Fire Man

Video.summary: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.
Video.title: Case X

Video.summary: After seeing his mother killed by a stranger, a boy withdraws deep into himself, prompting a sympathetic Tony to step up his efforts to catch the murderer.
Video.title: The Wicked Flee

Video.summary: A mugging triggers a woman's repressed memory of her brother's murder, which she witnessed as a child.
Video.title: Skeletons

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes that remind him of his wife who jilted him.
Video.title: Sniper

Video.summary: A contract killer makes hits throughout the city in order to ingratiate himself with a criminal kingpin.
Video.title: The Last Kill

Video.summary: During the holiday season, Tony investigates the murder of an elderly woman.
Video.title: No Greater Gift

Video.summary: A serial killer has been mutilating the bodies of Eastbridge transients and homeless people.
Video.title: The Commissioner's Ball

Video.summary: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.
Video.title: Charlie Don't Surf

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali's friend and colleague, Chief of Detectives Irv Wallerstein, is struck down.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: Rita is stunned when her ex, a major league player, is suspected of murdering a club owner.
Video.title: Squeeze Play

Video.summary: Rita and Chris probe a fan who admits to killing the girlfriend of a brash radio star.
Video.title: Shock Jock

Video.summary: A commander kills his wife’s lover, then frames Chris and Rita by manipulating a D.A. and evidence.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victim’s mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: Rita and Chris get involved when a wealthy over-sexed Palm Beach businessman puts out a contract on a smalltime loser who is partially responsible for the death of a woman in the businessman's well-paid harem.
Video.title: Wild Card

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a vice cop, and Chris must deal with the victim's son.
Video.title: In Too Deep

Video.summary: Two brothers are suspected of brutally murdering their parents.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks

Video.summary: Reno meets his counterpart: a female motorcycle-riding fugitive who is wanted by the police. LINDA BLAIR guest stars.
Video.title: Self Defense

Video.summary: A motivational speaker uses Reno and Bobby to avoid being ruined by his scandalous past.
Video.title: Mr. Success

Video.summary: Bobby must prove the innocence of one of his former bounties.
Video.title: Five Minutes To Midnight
